name: Chewy Peanut Butter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate, peanut butter, and margarine together.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs, sugar, salt, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add the melted chocolate mixture to the egg mixture.
4. Mix in the sifted flour slowly.
5. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
8. Allow the brownies to cool completely before cutting into squares.
From "The Ultimate Peanut Butter Cookbook" by Arthur Boze
